title: pternandra elmeri
intro: Pternandra elmeri, also known as the Wild Jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the family Sapindaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Pternandra elmeri include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
